text:
LABEL: Medicaid Non-Capitated Payment Amount — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of the Medicaid payment amounts from the inpatient (IP), long-term care (LT), 
pharmacy (RX) and other services (OT) (header) claims for the beneficiary for the month – after 
removing the Medicaid managed care capitated payments. Note that this dollar amount may be an 
undercount if the beneficiary had managed care claims. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Claims File
